response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute or hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primarily JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang experience. There is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, C++ at scale, or formal tech-lead mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across many domains
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring via talks)
Some exposure to high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; C/C++ experience is limited to ~6 months at NI
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership
Lacks formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Strong craftsmanship and mentoring via talks/workshops
